sheet_name: แปลนระบบสุขาภิบาลหลังคา

roof_areas.label: หลังคาเหล็กรีดลอน
roof_areas.description: main pitched roof, corrugated/ribbed steel roofing, covering the full building footprint from row F down to roughly row C; two SLOPE arrows printed near grid2 and grid3 vertical lines indicate the roof's fall direction toward the drain point

roof_areas.label: หลังคา ค.ส.ล. +4.00
roof_areas.description: secondary flat RC roof/canopy at level +4.00, smaller footprint (printed width 3.20 m) located below the main roof, roughly centered between grid2-3, extending toward row A -- likely the carport/entrance canopy roof

dimensions_m.x_overhang_note: 1.30 m overhang beyond grid1 (west) and beyond grid4 (east) on both sides of the 9.60 m grid span
dimensions_m.y_overhang_note: 1.50 m overhang above row F (north); the lower portion of the chain (below row D) shows a 1.80 m segment further broken down into 0.30 + 1.50 near the roof-step/canopy transition, read with lower confidence -- see warnings

elements.description: Ø3"RD (รูระบายน้ำฝนรูปโดม) -- roof drain, circle symbol near the south-east corner of the main roof, at approximately grid3-4/row C
Ø3"RL (ท่อระบายน้ำฝนแนวดิ่ง) -- vertical rainwater leader pipe, adjacent to the roof drain, carrying runoff down to the site storm drain shown on the floor plan (SN-04)
elements.grid_ref: C x ~3-4, immediately beside the roof drain symbol

warnings: PATTERN CLASSIFICATION NOTE: classified this page as 'plan' rather than 'roof_plan' because its actual content is a sanitary/drainage layout (roof drain + rainwater leader sizing and slope direction), not architectural roof geometry (no ridge/hip lines, eave framing, or roofing-material takeoff shown beyond the two area labels) -- consistent with treating it as the sanitary-discipline counterpart to the SN-04 floor plan, on the same confirmed structural grid.

GRID CONFIRMATION: the printed grid labels (1,2,3,4) and total x-span 9.60 m (3.20+3.20+3.20) plus grid row labels (F,E,D,C,B,A) with total y-span 14.55 m match this house's grid master (หน้า00_gridline.json) exactly for the named grid lines.

The roof footprint extends beyond the named grid by a 1.30 m overhang on both the west (beyond grid1) and east (beyond grid4) sides at the top/main-roof level -- this overhang is a printed dimension line but does NOT need a dummy grid line per the schema (it is a roof eave overhang relative to the wall grid, the same kind of overhang the grid master's own note anticipates from the architecture-discipline pages, not a new structural support line). Flagging this here per the task's instruction to report anything that might need a shared-grid update, even though no new grid line is being invented.

The lower portion of the vertical dimension chain (the 1.80 m segment further broken into 0.30 + 1.50 near the transition from the main pitched roof to the smaller RC canopy roof below it) is printed in small text close to the row-C/row-B area and is only partially legible at this resolution -- the exact step/offset geometry between the two roof levels is best-effort, flagged for human zoom-review; this does not affect the two sanitary elements (RD/RL) which are clearly legible and unambiguous.
This page has no sibling files (single view, no legend/schedule table on this sheet).
